Off Calendar May-29-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-04-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Bank of America's motion to compel responses to request for production (all defendants) and form interrogatories (defendants: Don Todd Associates, Daniel Anderson, Vicki Anderson, Roosevelt Hattin) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,174 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DefendantDon todd Associates' motion for a protective order is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Set For Trial On Jun-18-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-30-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 604
